description.value: Price 21,820 gp; Slot none; CL 10th; Weight 3 lbs.; Aura moderate evocation and transmutation DESCRIPTION Crafted to defend against enemies seeking to damage it rather than its wielder, a Duel master’s edge is a +2 countering impervious dueling sword. If the blade is ever destroyed, it explodes with tremendous force, dealing 10d6 points of fire damage to every creature within a 20-foot-radius spread ( Reflex DC 14 half). CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 11,070 gp; Feats Combat Reflexes, Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells cat’s grace, fabricate, fireball, make whole
